title: JUST PORCH IT AND ECO WORLD - 211info
text: JUST PORCH IT JUST PORCH IT AND ECO WORLD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides no-contact pickup service for clothing, backpacks, belts, accessories, fabric, hats, purses, shoes, bedding, linens, towels, knickknacks, and small household items to be recycled and repurposed. Also has donation bins for drop off. Serves as a source for local school and church closets, non-profits, disaster relief victims, and thrift stores. Items deemed as unusable are recycled and kept out of landfills. Eligibility: Reusable items for donation, or items that have holes, stains, or are damaged that can be recycled. Does not accept items that are wet or moldy. Hours: Pickup: Varies Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Donation bins: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (800) 965-6519 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 965-6519 Donation Pick up [email protected] Alternate (559) 369-4212 Donation Bins [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Pickup: Call, text, or visit website to schedule Donation bins: Email or call for bin locations. To locate the three nearest locations, the agency will need the closest main cross streets. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Tillamook, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Pickups Recycling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
